01

Fast.

No delivery, no waiting lists. You come, you order, you eat it now. That's the rule.

02

Hot.

NYC-style pizza at its absolute peak. Not reheated, not delivered, not compromised. Ever.

03

Limited.

We make a fixed number of pizzas per day. When they're gone, they're gone. That's why every bite matters.

Our Story

The Beginning

In cities like Barcelona, pizza has become predictable. Always there, always available. But cravings don't work like that. What's everywhere loses its edge.

Either it's overly precious — "gourmet" (but we know it's just served in an instagrammable place) — or it's a soggy afterthought on Glovo. Pizza used to be a craving. Now it's a commodity.

We bring back the hunger by making it rare again. Because desire only hits when there's a chance you might miss it.

Fast.  Hot.  Limited.

Why we exist

The Chaos of Craving Done Right

Where pizza became too pretty or too predictable, we show up fantastically real and hot. Our mission is simple: feed the gut and hit the heart. Limited pizzas, short windows, no second chances. That's why every bite matters.

Crave. Bite. Repeat.

The Product
Hot & Fresh
The Space

Crave

The brand exists to trigger desire.

The pizza is not an everyday meal —it's an indulgent, emotional decision. We're the place people think about when they need something satisfying. Crave comes first.

  • Limited menu: focus and obsession
  • Time-based scarcity
  • Portion scarcity
  • Product rotation

Vibe

We operate at the intersection of NYC and BCN.

It's fast, but not rushed. Casual, but not sloppy. We're social, urban and always in motion. We believe in loyalty through recognition.

  • Old world architecture, street-level rawness
  • Music-driven space
  • "Eat it now" rule
  • Exclusive merch & secret menus

Control

Behind the chaos, everything is intentional.

Product quality, logistics, branding, packaging: nothing is random. We execute with precision even when the brand feels casual. That's how we maintain quality, consistency and credibility.

  • Precise recipe
  • Local ingredients
  • Boxes designed to ventilate
  • Serving function, not only aesthetics

Our personality

The Sensory Dealer

I don't care about doing things just to check a box. If it doesn't hit, if it doesn't move people, what's the point? I like when something shows up at the exact right moment — not too early, not too late. That kind of timing isn't luck. It's done on purpose.

I'm not here to make noise for the sake of it. I want what I do to actually land, and stay with people. I don't water stuff down so it's easier to sell. If it's not honest, it's not worth doing.

What I'm really afraid of? Being forgettable. Doing something just okay. Letting it slide when I know it could've hit harder. I like having control. But I also like taking risks. I like the tension between things that feel raw and things that are built to last.

That's how I work. I don't overexplain. I just make sure you feel it.

Not built for everyone.
Some will love it, others will hate it.
That's how we become a cultural magnet.

Inner Circle

Friends of
Slice Shop

A low-key but powerful way to turn regulars, locals, and insiders into loyal advocates.

Priority Access

Early slice holds, first dibs on drops. You get in before anyone else knows it exists.

Exclusive Merch

Limited runs unlocked only for Friends. Not available anywhere else.

Secret Menu

Off-menu slices announced via broadcast channel. No app, no noise — just a message.

Playlist Collabs

Community-curated music shaping the vibe in-store. You help set the tone.

Polaroid Wall

Names and faces as part of the space. Recognition as loyalty.

After Hours Invites

Tastings, DJs, and collab nights. The kind of nights you don't post about.
